channel.title: Reviews in the Neurosciences
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Reviews in the Neurosciences

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Zainab B. Mohammad, Samantha C. Y. Yudin, Benjamin J. Goldberg, Kursti L. Serra, Andis Klegeris DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: A review of the application of exercise intervention on improving cognition in patients with Alzheimer’s disease: mechanisms and clinical studies
item.description: Article by Zainab B. Mohammad, Samantha C. Y. Yudin, Benjamin J. Goldberg, Kursti L. Serra, Andis Klegeris DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0046

item.title: The neurobiological mechanisms underlying the effects of exercise interventions in autistic individuals
item.description: Article by Zainab B. Mohammad, Samantha C. Y. Yudin, Benjamin J. Goldberg, Kursti L. Serra, Andis Klegeris DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0058

item.title: Unraveling mitochondrial dysfunction: comprehensive perspectives on its impact on neurodegenerative diseases
item.description: Article by Zainab B. Mohammad, Samantha C. Y. Yudin, Benjamin J. Goldberg, Kursti L. Serra, Andis Klegeris DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0080

item.title: Exploring neuroglial signaling: diversity of molecules implicated in microglia-to-astrocyte neuroimmune communication
item.description: Article by Zainab B. Mohammad, Samantha C. Y. Yudin, Benjamin J. Goldberg, Kursti L. Serra, Andis Klegeris DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revneuro-2024-0081
